items.title: Parents turn to online groups to clothe kids with amputations

children.content: Braxton's mum says there needs to be more clothing options available for children with amputations, after struggling to find some for her son whose leg became amputated in the womb.

items.title: Panthers coach gives 13-word press conference after consecutive losses

children.content: Penrith Panthers coach Ivan Cleary has said just 13 words in his post-match press conference after the NRL leaders fell to consecutive defeats for the first time this season.

items.title: Heavy rain to soak Australia's east as un-El-Niño-like weather continues

children.content: For an El Niño year, 2026 is so far the wettest on record for Australia, and an influx of tropical moisture is about to deliver another round of widespread rain.

items.title: Judge rejects role of Ozempic in grandmother's roadside stabbing attack

children.content: A 60-year-old woman who stabbed her grandson and daughter-in-law has been sentenced to jail. Her defence team had argued she was suffering sudden and extreme anger partially induced by weight-loss medication.

items.title: Juice company fined $250k over forklift crash that took woman's toes

children.content: The Industrial Relations Commission hears the incident at the Real Juice Company was the third involving a forklift at the site, where drivers had received no training.

items.title: Stefanovic thanks audience for 21 years on Today after 'tough' few days

children.content: Today show host Karl Stefanovic will leave Channel Nine after a controversial podcast interview with British far-right figure Tommy Robinson.

children.content: Listening to the culture war showman schtick he has so quickly adopted, Karl Stefanovic is now less a newsman than an ideological performer.

items.title: Two men charged as NSW Police seize 64 kilograms of  drugs

children.content: Police have charged two men and seized almost 64 kilograms of drugs with an estimated street value of more than $2.5 million, north of Newcastle.

items.title: New bridge announced but Great Western Highway closed for another year

children.content: A new bridge will be built at Mitchell's Causeway on the Great Western Highway to link Sydney and the state's Central West.

items.title: Art 'like medicine' for accountant turned artist after brain injury

children.content: After undergoing brain surgery, Cheryl Blacklock can no longer process numbers quickly and has instead found a new life through art, painting faces that appear as visions in her mind.
